channel.title: PixConvert Blog
channel.description: Expert guides on image formats, compression, and conversion. HEIC vs JPG, WebP vs PNG, AVIF explained, and more.

item.title: HEIC vs JPG: Complete Comparison Guide 2026
item.description: Detailed comparison of HEIC and JPEG image formats. Learn about file size, quality, compatibility, and when to use each format.

item.title: How to Convert HEIC to JPG on Windows 10 and 11
item.description: Step-by-step guide to convert iPhone HEIC photos to JPG on Windows. Free methods including browser tools, Windows Photos app, and more.

item.title: PNG vs JPG: Which Image Format Is Best for Your Website?
item.description: Learn when to use PNG vs JPEG for web images. Performance tips, quality comparison, and SEO implications of image format choice.

item.title: What Is AVIF? The Next-Gen Image Format Explained
item.description: Everything you need to know about AVIF: the most advanced image format. Learn about compression, browser support, and how to use AVIF today.

item.title: WebP vs PNG vs JPG: Which Format Should You Use?
item.description: Head-to-head comparison of WebP, PNG, and JPEG. File sizes, quality, browser support, and recommendations for every use case.

item.title: How to Convert HEIC to JPG on Mac: 4 Easy Methods
item.description: Convert iPhone HEIC photos to JPG on Mac automatically or manually. Includes built-in Mac tools and our free online converter.

item.title: Lossless vs Lossy Image Compression: Complete Guide
item.description: Understand the difference between lossless and lossy compression. When to use each type and how it affects image quality.

item.title: Best Image Format for Social Media in 2026: Complete Guide
item.description: Optimize your images for Instagram, Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, and TikTok. Recommended formats, sizes, and compression tips.

item.title: How to Open HEIC Files on Android: Complete Guide
item.description: Can Android open HEIC photos? Learn how to view and convert iPhone HEIC images on Samsung, Google Pixel, and other Android devices.

item.title: TIFF vs PNG vs JPEG: Best Format for Scanning Documents
item.description: Which image format is best for document scanning? Compare TIFF, PNG, and JPEG for scans, OCR, and archival purposes.

item.title: SVG vs PNG for Web Design: When to Use Each
item.description: SVG vector vs PNG raster: which format works best for icons, logos, illustrations, and images on the modern web.

item.title: GIF vs PNG vs WebP for Animations: Which Is Best?
item.description: Compare GIF, animated PNG (APNG), and animated WebP for creating and sharing animations on the web and social media.
